reason: Browser use feature successfully executes browser tools to open a URL and retrieve page title information
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with three agents in sidebar
Step 2 - Clicked on "QA-20260428-112814-3b3g" agent in sidebar — Agent interface opened showing chat input area and configuration options
Step 3 - Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", browser tools began executing
Step 4 - Waited for agent response — Agent successfully completed browser operations:
Step 5 - Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." Verification successful. Task completed in 7 seconds.
